title: CCTV NVR Disk Utilization and Retention Policy Compliance
app: Custom TA (NVR REST/syslog), ONVIF pull, Hikvision ISAPI HEC, or Milestone connector mapped to listed sourcetypes
spl:
index=physical sourcetype="nvr:diagnostic" earliest=-24h
| eval util=tonumber(coalesce(disk_util_pct, storage_used_pct, ""))
| eval days_left=tonumber(coalesce(retention_days_remaining, ""))
| where util>85 OR (isnotnull(days_left) AND days_left<7)
| stats latest(util) as disk_util_pct latest(days_left) as retention_days_remaining by nvr_name volume_id
description: Full arrays trigger oldest-footage purge; trending utilization schedules expansions before policy violations.
value: Avoids automatic deletion surprises during investigations.
implementation: (1) Ingest per-volume metrics. (2) Model growth rate. (3) Ticket storage team at 80%.
grandmaExplanation: We watch recorder disk space so required video is not deleted too soon.
